problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
